name: Network Operations
description: Responsible for the real-time operation, monitoring, and control of the electrical distribution network.

name: Asset Management
description: Manages the lifecycle of physical assets including poles, transformers, substations, and cables.

name: Finance
description: Responsible for financial accounting, budgeting, treasury, and regulatory reporting.

name: Human Resources
description: Manages workforce planning, recruitment, payroll, and employee relations.

name: Information Technology
description: Provides and supports IT systems, cloud infrastructure, integration platforms, and cybersecurity.

name: Customer Service
description: Manages customer accounts, billing, service requests, and complaint resolution.

name: Warehouse & Logistics
description: Manages materials inventory, procurement, warehousing, and logistics for field operations.

name: Executive
description: Corporate leadership including CEO, CFO, COO, and functional heads.
